required_literals: CONFIGURATION RECIPE - NOT AN SZL WEIGHT RELEASE
license_name: NVIDIA Nemotron Open Model License

qualification_gates.name: upstream_identity_and_license
qualification_gates.evidence: release-manifest.json and local attestation bind NVIDIA origin, exact upstream manifest, and NVIDIA license.

qualification_gates.name: exact_local_load_and_generate
qualification_gates.evidence: One exact szl-nemo:latest loopback inference and process-boot DSSE receipt verified.

qualification_gates.name: nemotron_compatible_szl_adapter
qualification_gates.evidence: No Nemotron-compatible SZL adapter exists; the Qwen adapter is architecture- and vocabulary-incompatible.

qualification_gates.name: admitted_training_data_and_run
qualification_gates.evidence: No SZL-Nemo training contract execution or admitted training split exists.

qualification_gates.name: held_out_quality_safety_and_restart
qualification_gates.evidence: A single runtime identity probe is not a held-out model qualification suite.

qualification_gates.name: organization_identity_attestation_and_log
qualification_gates.evidence: The observed key is process-boot-ephemeral and no transparency-log release record exists.

qualification_gates.name: independent_hub_readback
qualification_gates.evidence: No trained candidate has been uploaded; therefore no immutable remote weight readback can exist.

required_literals: TRAINING CANDIDATE - NO ADAPTER WEIGHTS YET

qualification_gates.name: project_authored_curriculum_and_holdout
qualification_gates.evidence: The generated 24-row train and 8-row held-out split are deterministic and project-authored; raw Brain and formula rows remain excluded.

qualification_gates.name: immutable_base_local_preflight
qualification_gates.evidence: The contract pins the remote revision and expected files, but the 7,947,142,640-byte safetensors transfer has not completed and no full local hash preflight receipt exists.

qualification_gates.name: gpu_admission_and_training_run
qualification_gates.evidence: No governed SZL-Nemo adapter training completion receipt is bound to this candidate.

qualification_gates.name: adapter_safetensors_and_config
qualification_gates.evidence: No SZL-Nemo Governed Adapter safetensors or adapter config exists.

qualification_gates.name: clean_reload_and_exact_eval
qualification_gates.evidence: No trained adapter exists to rebind to the exact NVIDIA base and evaluate.

qualification_gates.name: broader_safety_identity_resource_restart
qualification_gates.evidence: The eight-row training holdout is necessary but not sufficient for release quality, safety, resource, or recovery claims.

qualification_gates.name: license_notice_and_adapter_review
qualification_gates.evidence: The base license is pinned; the exact adapter artifact and separate release license review do not yet exist.

qualification_gates.name: organization_identity_attestation_and_log
qualification_gates.evidence: No exact-candidate asymmetric DSSE/in-toto statement or transparency-log entry exists.

qualification_gates.name: human_release_approval
qualification_gates.evidence: No named human approval is bound to an exact adapter digest.

qualification_gates.name: independent_hub_readback
qualification_gates.evidence: The target repository does not exist and no candidate was uploaded.

required_literals: MODEL PROGRAM - NOT A WEIGHT RELEASE

qualification_gates.name: immutable_base_file_set
qualification_gates.evidence: Pinned local Qwen2.5 base snapshot file set passed preflight.

qualification_gates.name: project_authored_curriculum
qualification_gates.evidence: Deterministic 30-row train and 8-row eval curriculum manifest passed admission.

qualification_gates.name: gpu_admission_and_training_run
qualification_gates.evidence: GPU thermal/free-memory soak has not admitted a run; training_started=false.

qualification_gates.name: adapter_safetensors_and_config
qualification_gates.evidence: No ReceiptAgent-specific adapter artifact exists.

qualification_gates.name: clean_reload_and_exact_eval
qualification_gates.evidence: No trained adapter exists to reload or evaluate.

qualification_gates.name: full_preregistered_evaluation
qualification_gates.evidence: The full frozen ReceiptAgent and formula/Brain holdout suites have not run.

qualification_gates.name: license_and_row_rights
qualification_gates.evidence: Adapter release license and any non-project-authored row reuse remain pending legal/lineage review.

qualification_gates.name: organization_identity_attestation_and_log
qualification_gates.evidence: No exact-candidate asymmetric DSSE/in-toto statement or transparency-log entry exists.

qualification_gates.name: human_release_approval
qualification_gates.evidence: No named human approval is bound to an exact candidate digest.

qualification_gates.name: independent_hub_readback
qualification_gates.evidence: The target repository does not exist and no candidate was uploaded.

global_release_predicate: Every blocking candidate gate is PASS for the exact artifact class being promoted.
Every local artifact path, byte count, and SHA-256 matches this manifest before staging.
The payload inventory contains only allowlisted non-executable formats and no symlinks.
The candidate base, tokenizer, adapter or recipe, data split, code revision, license, and card are mutually hash-bound.
Bucket staging uses a never-reused attempt id and candidate-specific prefix, then full independent readback and signed completion.
Canonical Hub publication is a separate named-human action followed by immutable revision and file-digest readback.
No bucket object, completion marker, local runtime tag, model card, or training process exit code alone authorizes publication.
